# Third-party 3D models

This folder contains downloaded GLB assets used as replacement geometry for the prototype world.

## Suburban Houses Pack

- Source: https://poly.pizza/bundle/Suburban-Houses-Pack-dZQwy8vcDv
- Creator: Kenney
- License shown by Poly Pizza: CC0 / Public Domain
- Original creator site: https://kenney.nl/

These assets are used to replace the earlier procedural box-based exterior houses with real model geometry.

## Stylized Nature MegaKit

- Source: https://poly.pizza/bundle/Stylized-Nature-MegaKit-T34GZFA0fm
- Creator: Quaternius
- License shown by Poly Pizza: CC0 1.0
- Original creator site: https://quaternius.com/

Selected assets are used for exterior trees, plants, grass, rocks, and path details.

## Furniture Pack

- Source: https://poly.pizza/bundle/Furniture-Pack-pgvx8Zkq8v
- Creator: Quaternius
- License shown by Poly Pizza: CC0 1.0
- Original creator site: https://quaternius.com/

Selected assets are used for the Casa 1 desk, office chair, bookcase, and furniture details.

## Ultimate House Interior Pack

- Source: https://poly.pizza/bundle/Ultimate-House-Interior-Pack-2SXnFbwFzm
- Creator: Quaternius
- License shown by Poly Pizza: CC0 1.0
- Original creator site: https://quaternius.com/

Selected assets are used for Casa 1 interior props, plants, lights, seating, rugs, and small decor.
